description: Alien, unnatural entities from beyond reality — tentacled horrors and mind-bending abominations.
creatures: Aboleth
An ancient aquatic horror that secretes mind-controlling mucus and remembers the world before gods.
Beholder
A floating orb of paranoid malice, its central eye ringed by stalks that each fire a different magical ray.
Gibbering Mouther
A crawling heap of eyes and mouths that babbles maddening sounds and melts the ground beneath it.
Chuul
A lobster-shelled ambush predator that drags victims underwater with paralytic tentacles.
Otyugh
A three-legged, tentacled scavenger that lurks in refuse heaps and devours anything organic.
Cloaker
A flat, ray-like predator that hangs from cave ceilings disguised as a cloak until it wraps around a victim.
Grick
A worm-bodied predator with tentacle arms and stone-colored hide, nearly invisible against cavern walls.
Roper
A cone-shaped ambusher that resembles a stalagmite until its sticky tendrils lash out to reel in prey.
Flumph
A gentle, floating jellyfish creature that communicates through telepathy and glows when frightened.
Slaad
A chaotic frog-like horror from Limbo that implants eggs in living hosts and mutates without warning.
Star Spawn
A writhing emissary of alien gods, its form twisting in ways the eye refuses to follow.
Intellect Devourer
A brain on clawed legs that devours a victim's mind and pilots the empty body like a puppet.
